data.body: PR #10 CI confirms primary fix landed: workflow now parses, all 3 Ticket tests check contexts now report on PRs (was 0 before), Actionlint job passes. Two pre-existing platform-compat bugs surfaced (hidden under startup_failure for 5+ days) and filed separately: 4fd5-b952 (macos-bash3 — 15/17 fail, likely bash-4 idioms in ticket-lib-api.sh) and f3e9-c70f (alpine-busybox — bash not on PATH or ash overrides shebang). PR awaiting merge approval.
